suppress.notes: False positive. CVE-2025-15104 is a Server-Side Request Forgery in the Nu Html Checker (validator.nu / "vnu"). dependency-check matches it to hibernate-validator only through the bogus cpe:/a:validator:validator entry. Not applicable to Hibernate Validator.

False positive. CVE-2026-42154 is a denial of service in the Prometheus SERVER remote-read endpoint (snappy bomb), fixed in Prometheus 3.5.3 / 3.11.3. These artifacts are Micrometer / Prometheus CLIENT libraries mis-matched via cpe:/a:prometheus:prometheus (known dependency-check false positive, DependencyCheck issue #7689).

Not applicable. handlebars.java bundles the Handlebars JavaScript precompiler (handlebars-v*.js) as a resource inside its jar. This is a pure server-side Java template engine; the bundled JavaScript is never executed at runtime, so JavaScript-only Handlebars CVEs do not apply. Suppressing all vulnerabilities reported against the bundled JS package.
